name: Llama 2 13B
note: Mid-size Llama 2 base model, pretrained on 2T tokens with a 4K context window and the first commercially-licensed Llama generation.
tpsNote: No verified base-model-specific RTX 4090 figure; the widely-cited ~71 tok/s Ollama benchmark for 'llama2:13b' targets Ollama's default chat-tuned weights, not this base checkpoint.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card
3-shot, Table 3 'Overall performance on grouped academic benchmarks'
3-5 shot, English tasks average, Table 3 (detailed per-task breakdown in Table 24)
pass@1, Table 21 'Code generation results on Human-Eval and MBPP' (pretrained-model comparison table; also pass@100 = 60.2 reported there but not mapped, no taxonomy slug distinguishes pass@100)
pass@1 (3-shot), Table 21. Cross-checked: (HumanEval 18.3 + MBPP 30.6)/2 = 24.45 ≈ Table 3's composite 'Code' column value of 24.5 for this row, corroborating both figures.
8-shot, maj1@1, Table 25 'Comparison to other open-source models on mathematical reasoning tasks'
4-shot, maj1@1, Table 25. Note: below the taxonomy's typical 20-100 range, but is the genuine published figure for this 2023 base model on the full MATH test set.
Table 11 'Evaluation of pretrained LLMs on automatic safety benchmarks' (percent truthful+informative); a separate ToxiGen=26.10 is also reported there but has no taxonomy slug.

0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' of the official Llama 2 paper. None of the seven common-sense-reasoning rows in this table (PIQA, SIQA, HellaSwag, WinoGrande, ARC-e, ARC-c, OBQA) were previously tracked for the 13B model even though they are tracked for the 70B and LLaMA-33B siblings.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (SIQA column) of the official Llama 2 paper.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (HellaSwag column) of the official Llama 2 paper.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (WinoGrande column) of the official Llama 2 paper.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (ARC-e column) of the official Llama 2 paper.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (ARC-c column) of the official Llama 2 paper.
0-shot, Table 20 'Performance on standard benchmarks' (OBQA column) of the official Llama 2 paper.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via Hugging Face meta-llama/Llama-2-13b page (13B params, 4096 ctx, Llama 2 Community License) and release date 2023-07-18 corroborated by Ollama/HF sources. Fetched MODEL_CARD.md and confirmed MMLU 54.8 appears for the Llama-2-13B pretrained row. No changes made.
